name: header-editor-pro-free
description: Professional HTTP header editor for web developers, API testing, and debugging - completely free with unlimited profiles

scripts.create-source-package: VERSION=$(npm run get-version --silent) && zip -r "header-editor-pro-free-source-v${VERSION}.zip" src/ package*.json rspack.config.js BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md README.md
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run create-source-package && VERSION=$(npm run get-version --silent) && cd dist && zip -r "../header-editor-pro-free-extension-v${VERSION}.zip" .

author: testacode.com
